overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit palm trees, digital billboards, and industrial overhead transit infrastructure. The player walks alongside a passing train in a dense, atmospheric urban environment from the game Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked commercial street with neon billboards and palm trees

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the overhead gantry structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk toward an overhead industrial gantry

entered.detail: tall palm trees with orange neon lighting illuminating their fronds
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements with blue and red colors
industrial metal gantry with directional arrow signs spanning across the street
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the street
network of large industrial pipes and cables running overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Orange neon streetlights illuminate palm trees on the left while digital billboards glow in the distance. The camera approaches a large industrial gantry structure that spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor under overhead gantry with approaching train

events.description: passing under the overhead gantry structure with directional signs
train becomes visible approaching on the parallel tracks to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the gantry, approaching a visible train on the parallel tracks to the right

notable_agents.action: train approaching slowly on the parallel tracks, headlights visible through the mist

entered.detail: elevated train tracks running parallel to the sidewalk
dark train with headlights on approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the industrial gantry, transitioning into a more open transit corridor. Train tracks become visible on the right, and a train with glowing headlights approaches through the rainy mist. The palm trees recede into the distance on the left as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway alongside active train tracks with passing freight train

events.description: train arrives alongside the camera, occupying the right side of the frame
train cars temporarily block the view of the right side and background buildings

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the passing train, moving parallel to the rail cars on the narrow sidewalk

notable_agents.action: long freight train moving slowly on parallel tracks, filling the right side with dark metal cars

entered.detail: dark industrial freight train cars with metal frames and cylindrical tanks passing by

segments.scene_description: The train catches up and passes alongside the camera, its dark industrial cars filling the right side of the frame. The walkway feels narrow between the concrete barrier on the left and the moving train on the right. Orange neon lights reflect off the wet surfaces and the train's metal exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street continuing past the train with billboards

events.description: passing the end of the train, revealing open tracks ahead
exiting the narrow train corridor back to the open street with more visible skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the train, with the rail cars now receding behind

entered.detail: large digital billboard with bright pink and purple neon advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the end of the train, returning to a more open section of the street. New neon billboards become visible on the left as the train tracks recede into the distance on the right. The rain continues to fall, creating reflective pools on the concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from a neon-lit promenade into a narrow industrial transit corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk where orange neon streetlights illuminate palm trees and distant digital billboards before the camera approaches a massive industrial gantry. As the camera passes under this structure, the scene opens into a transit corridor where a train with glowing headlights emerges through the rainy mist. The environment then feels constricted as the moving train catches up and passes alongside the camera, its dark metal exterior reflecting the orange neon glow of the wet surroundings. Finally, the camera passes the end of the train and returns to an open stretch of street, where new billboards appear on the left and reflective pools form on the sidewalk as the tracks recede into the distance.
